name: @liangdi/wecom-pro
description: 企业微信命令行工具 — 让人类和 AI Agent 都能在终端中操作企业微信

scripts.build:linux: cargo build --release --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu && mkdir -p packages/linux-x64/bin && cp target/x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/release/wecom-pro packages/linux-x64/bin/
scripts.build:darwin-x64: cargo build --release --target x86_64-apple-darwin && mkdir -p packages/darwin-x64/bin && cp target/x86_64-apple-darwin/release/wecom-pro packages/darwin-x64/bin/
scripts.build:darwin-arm64: cargo build --release --target aarch64-apple-darwin && mkdir -p packages/darwin-arm64/bin && cp target/aarch64-apple-darwin/release/wecom-pro packages/darwin-arm64/bin/
scripts.build:windows: cargo build --release --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc && mkdir -p packages/win32-x64/bin && cp target/x86_64-pc-windows-msvc/release/wecom-pro.exe packages/win32-x64/bin/
scripts.publish:all: npm run build:npm && cd packages/linux-x64 && npm publish && cd ../darwin-x64 && npm publish && cd ../darwin-arm64 && npm publish && cd ../win32-x64 && npm publish && cd ../.. && npm publish
